unreleased_commits.author: JaredHatfield
unreleased_commits.message:
fix: correct --author flag example to use dependabot[bot] login

The --author flag uses exact string matching against the GitHub API
user.login field. For Dependabot PRs, the API returns dependabot[bot],
not app/dependabot. The previous documentation and flag help incorrectly
used app/dependabot, causing --author app/dependabot to match zero PRs.

Updated flag help text and all documentation to use the correct
dependabot[bot] login.
